tagline: Trusted Pet Health, Delivered Across South Africa

launchProduct.name: Senior Cat Kidney Support Powder
launchProduct.reason: Lowest breakeven (20 units), 54.55% margin, medium competition, organic demand growth

productCatalogue.name: Pet Anxiety Calming CBD Oil Drops
Rabbit and Guinea Pig Dental Chew Toys

supplierMatrix.bestSupplier: CJ Dropshipping (scale to local SAPC supplier)

supplierMatrix.product: Pet Anxiety Calming CBD Oil Drops
Rabbit and Guinea Pig Dental Chew Toys

competitivePositioning.uniqueUSP: SA-specific kidney support for senior cats with vet-informed, locally compliant sourcing
competitivePositioning.pricingAngle: R220 mid-tier; subscribe-and-save at R190/month undercuts vet clinics (R300+)
top3CompetitorWeaknesses: Competitors lack SAPC registration signals, creating exploitable local trust gap
Cold clinical copy fails to connect emotionally with distressed CKD cat owners
No subscription or refill model — missing high LTV from daily chronic dosing

trafficStrategy.primaryChannel: Facebook/Instagram targeting SA cat owners aged 35-60, vet care interests
secondaryChannels: Google Search ads: 'cat kidney disease SA', 'senior cat supplement South Africa'
SEO blog content targeting CKD symptom and treatment queries
trafficStrategy.contentApproach: Emotional storytelling + vet-informed education targeting senior cat parents

pricingStrategy: R220 retail; R190/month subscribe-and-save; bundle 3-month supply at R580

goals: Onboard CJ Dropshipping supplier for cat kidney powder
Launch Facebook/Instagram ad campaigns with R500 test budget
Publish 2 SEO blog posts targeting CKD cat owner queries
Set up email capture and welcome flow
Analyse ad performance, optimise top creatives
Introduce subscribe-and-save offer to early customers
Add Senior Dog Joint Supplement as second SKU
Review month-1 CAC and ROAS against breakeven targets
Initiate contact with local SAPC-registered supplier for upgrade path
Plan month-2 content calendar and retargeting campaigns

riskFactors: CBD regulatory crackdowns may restrict oil drops marketing or importation
Customs delays on CJ Dropshipping health supplements causing customer churn
ZAR/USD exchange rate volatility compressing margins on imported stock
successMetrics: Month 1: Minimum 20 cat kidney powder units sold (breakeven threshold)
Month 3: ROAS above 3x on Facebook and Google combined ad spend
Month 3: 15%+ of customers on active subscribe-and-save plans
estimatedMonth3Revenue: R12,000 – R22,000 across 2-3 SKUs with optimised ads
